stemHtml: An airplane with a tricycle undercarriage, a single high-power turbine engine, and a propeller rotating clockwise (from the pilot's perspective) is taking off with full power from a wet grass runway. The pilot fails to properly control the aircraft's direction during the take-off roll, causing the plane to swerve to the left side of the runway before rotation. Which of the following propeller forces and effects contributed to this loss of control?
